ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
Param is a library providing Parameters: Python attributes
extended to have features such as type and range checking,
dynamically generated values, documentation strings, default
values, etc., each of which is inherited from parent classes
if not specified in a subclass.
about.summary: Param: Make your Python code clearer and more reliable by declaring Parameters

about.description:
Param is a library providing Parameters: Python attributes
extended to have features such as type and range checking,
dynamically generated values, documentation strings, default
values, etc., each of which is inherited from parent classes
if not specified in a subclass.
about.summary: Param: Make your Python code clearer and more reliable by declaring Parameters

name: param
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "param" %}
{% set python_min = "3.10" %}
{% set version = "2.3.0" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}


source:
  fn: param-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/p/param/param-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: b7e2b9c1d308d93c641937330990e8254aef479682c930b36ab681c4587d999a

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . --no-deps -vv

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - hatchling
    - hatch-vcs
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}

test:
  source_files:
    - tests
    - pyproject.toml
  requires:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - pytest
    - pytest-asyncio
    - numpy
    - pandas
    - ipython
    - jsonschema
    - cloudpickle
  imports:
    - param
    - numbergen
  commands:
    - pip check
    - pytest -v tests

about:
  home: https://param.holoviz.org/
  license: BSD-3-Clause
  license_family: BSD
  license_file: LICENSE.txt
  summary: 'Param: Make your Python code clearer and more reliable by declaring Parameters'
  description: |
    Param is a library providing Parameters: Python attributes
    extended to have features such as type and range checking,
    dynamically generated values, documentation strings, default
    values, etc., each of which is inherited from parent classes
    if not specified in a subclass.
  doc_url: https://param.holoviz.org/
  dev_url: https://github.com/holoviz/param

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - basnijholt
    - jlstevens
    - philippjfr
    - maximlt
